title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 368.030 - Capital stock
text:
368.030.  Capital stock. — The aggregate amount of the capital stock of any loan and investment company organized under this chapter shall not be more nor less than is provided for in the case of general and business corporations.
(RSMo 1939 § 5420, A.L. 1957 p. 212) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 4981; 1919 § 10191
